raw_title: How to fight the data grab
title_en: How to fight the data grab
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了如何应对大规模数据收集和利用的问题，为普通读者解释了保护个人数据权利的方法和策略。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how to address the issue of large-scale data collection and exploitation, explaining methods and strategies for protecting personal data rights to general readers.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代的数据权利保护、抵抗数据剥削的策略以及传播政策在数据治理中的作用。
research_direction_en: Research on data rights protection in the digital age, strategies for resisting data exploitation, and the role of communication policy in data governance.
